scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.prepare: sh -c 'git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config core.hooksPath .githooks || true'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.check:all: pnpm run check:silent-catches && pnpm run check:tenant-ownership && pnpm run check:sql-ambiguous-columns && pnpm run check:currency-leaks && pnpm run check:workspace-id-source
scripts.preflight:runtime: pnpm run preflight:smoke && pnpm run preflight:tenant-fuzz
scripts.preflight: pnpm run check:all && pnpm run typecheck:libs
scripts.preflight:full: pnpm run check:all && pnpm run typecheck
scripts.preflight:gate: pnpm run check:all && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run preflight:runtime
